name: Pear Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core and chop the pears. Measure them into a large saucepan.
2. Stir in the chopped orange, drained crushed pineapple, maraschino cherries, and lemon juice.
3. Add the pectin; mix well.
4. Bring to a full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in the sugar. Return to a full rolling boil; boil hard for 1 minute while continuously stirring.
6. Ladle into hot jars. Seal by processing in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes at 13 pounds pressure. Turn off the heat.
